title: VPI: vpiLeftRange always returns higher value, vpiRightRange lower value

features.name: unpacked array with ascending range bounds
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration where the range bounds are specified in ascending order (msb < lsb) such as [2:3] instead of typical [3:2]

features.name: VPI range query on unpacked array via vpiLeftRange and vpiRightRange
features.description: Code should include VPI code that queries the left and right range bounds of an unpacked array using vpiLeftRange and vpiRightRange handles to retrieve bound values
